$comment: Honesty ledger for every public pricing/valuation kernel (see scripts/ci/check_provenance.py and .kiro/steering/provenance.md). Enumerated from pricing/__init__.py __all__ (functions only -- Request/Result dataclasses are not kernels), the closed-form kernels named in numerics/*.py, and the three physical-asset kernels. category in {external-fixture, internal-closed-form, internal-anchor, blocked}; external-fixture/internal-closed-form must give a 'ref' that exists on disk, internal-anchor a free-text 'justification', blocked a free-text 'reason'. This is a record of what validation actually exists today, not an aspirational target -- gaps are named, not hidden.

kemna_vorst.note: No external fixture exists for the geometric-average Asian closed form; validated only against QuantVolt's own Monte Carlo kernel (test_geometric_mc_within_three_standard_errors_of_kemna_vorst).

turnbull_wakeman.note: Validated against QuantVolt's own arithmetic-averaging Monte Carlo kernel (test (d): Turnbull-Wakeman vs arithmetic-Asian MC), not an external reference library.

price_vanilla_option.note: Thin validate/package wrapper over black76_price/black76_greeks (module docstring: 'All real math lives in the kernel'); the fixture that validates the kernel validates this wrapper's math.

price_bachelier_option.note: Thin validate/package wrapper over bachelier_price/bachelier_greeks (module docstring: 'All real math lives in the kernel'); the fixture that validates the kernel validates this wrapper's math. Differs from price_vanilla_option only in validating forward/strike for finiteness (not positivity) so negative/zero underlyings price.

price_spread_option.note: Thin validate/package wrapper over kirk/margrabe (module docstring: 'Thin pricer over the pure kernels'); no added equation of its own.

price_spark_spread_option.note: Spark-spread convenience wrapper that scales forward2 by heat_rate before delegating to price_spread_option (kirk/margrabe); no added equation of its own.

implied_vol.note: Thin wrapper over numerics.black76_implied_vol; own added logic is OptionQuote/period packaging, not a new equation.

build_volatility_surface.justification: Grid-construction and nearest-ATM-strike-selection logic over implied_vol nodes (itself external-fixture, black76.json); the surface-building logic itself is unit-tested (tests/unit/test_implied_vol.py: test_surface_matches_inversion_at_quoted_periods, test_missing_months_are_linearly_interpolated, test_multiple_strikes_per_period_pick_nearest_atm_vol) but has no external reference of its own.

price_asian.note: Dispatches to turnbull_wakeman (arithmetic) or kemna_vorst (geometric), both validated against QuantVolt's own Monte Carlo kernel (test_mc_convergence.py test (d); tests/unit/test_monte_carlo.py). No external fixture for either averaging convention.

price_barrier.reason: No analytic-vs-discrete-MC comparison exists for the Reiner-Rubinstein continuous-monitoring closed form: a Broadie-Glasserman-Kou discretisation correction is required to make it comparable to a discretely-monitored Monte Carlo, and that correction is not implemented (Requirement 8.8, documented limitation in docs/validation.md).

price_lookback.reason: No analytic-vs-discrete-MC comparison exists for the Goldman-Sosin-Gatto / Conze-Viswanathan continuous-monitoring closed forms, for the same Broadie-Glasserman-Kou reason as price_barrier (Requirement 8.8, documented limitation in docs/validation.md).

storage_intrinsic.reason: cmdty-storage cross-check needs a .NET/pythonnet runtime unavailable in this environment; tests/validation/fixtures/storage.json does not exist and tests/validation/test_storage_fixtures.py collects zero cases as a result. An internal grid-refinement study exists instead (scripts/studies/storage_grid_refinement_study.py, .kiro/specs/external-validation/storage_grid_refinement.md) which pre-sizes the tolerances the (not yet generated) fixture would use.

storage_value.reason: Same as storage_intrinsic: cmdty-storage cross-check is BLOCKED on this environment (no .NET/pythonnet). Internal validation is analytic-vs-Monte-Carlo convergence (storage extrinsic -> 0 as sigma -> 1e-4, tests/validation/test_mc_convergence.py test (f)) plus the grid-refinement study, not an external reference library.

dispatch_value.justification: Property 63 (dispatch-tolling reconciliation): with every binding constraint removed (c_min=0, full ramp, zero start costs/durations) the optimal dispatch policy is myopic and dispatch_value must equal c_max times the price_tolling_agreement strip built on matching inputs -- tests/unit/test_dispatch_sdp.py, tests/property/test_asset_properties.py. This anchors dispatch_value to an independently-validated closed form in the unconstrained limit; it is not itself checked against an external optimizer.

price_futures.justification: NPV = discount_factor(settlement) * (forward_price - contract_price) * notional is a linear cash-flow identity, hand-anchored and unit-tested against hand-computed values -- tests/unit/test_pricing_futures.py (test_npv_matches_hand_computed_value).

futures_delta.justification: Exact analytic derivative of the linear price_futures NPV identity (delta = discount_factor * notional); tests/unit/test_pricing_futures.py (test_delta_equals_discount_factor_times_notional, test_delta_is_exact_for_any_bump_size).

price_swap.justification: Fixed-for-floating cash-flow identity summed per period, hand-anchored and unit-tested against hand-computed NPV/rho -- tests/unit/test_pricing_swap.py (test_two_period_npv_hand_computed, test_rho_matches_hand_computed_per_bp_formula).

value_transport_right.justification: Intrinsic PV is a per-period spread-payoff identity (Property 67/68); extrinsic value delegates to price_spread_option (external-fixture, spread.json) when volatilities/correlation are supplied. Hand-anchored and property-tested -- tests/property/test_extended_properties.py.

price_tolling_agreement.justification: Strip of clean spark/dark spread options, each priced through price_spread_option (external-fixture, spread.json); reconciled against unconstrained dispatch_value under Property 63 -- tests/unit/test_dispatch_sdp.py, tests/property/test_asset_properties.py.

price_ppa.justification: npv = sum_t DF(t) * V_t * (K_t - capture_t * F_t) is a linear cash-flow identity over a caller-supplied volume profile; hand-recomputed during the validation review of 2026-07-18 (no independent numerical method applies to a linear identity) and property-tested for linearity/delta consistency -- tests/property/test_portfolio_native_pricers_properties.py (test_ppa_mtm_is_linear_in_volume_and_forward_with_matching_finite_difference_delta).

settle_ppa_interval.justification: Deterministic realised-cash-flow accounting for one delivery interval (indexation -> clamp -> negative-price clause -> cap/floor overlay), no probability model; unit-tested against hand-computed settlements -- tests/unit/test_ppa.py.

reconcile_ppa_ledger.justification: Pure post-processing pass over an already-settled ledger (never modifies/re-derives settle_ppa_frame's rows): volume-band, availability, and consecutive-hour true-up cash flows, each a deterministic accounting identity (Requirements 9-11). Hand-computed and unit-tested -- tests/unit/test_ppa.py (test_reconcile_ppa_ledger_hand_computed_volume_band_and_availability_true_up, test_reconcile_ppa_ledger_consecutive_hour_true_up_hand_computed_physical).

settle_ppa_frame.justification: Vectorised per-row application of settle_ppa_interval's accounting over a Polars frame; unit-tested including caller column-mapping and reconciliation -- tests/unit/test_ppa.py (test_frame_settlement_accepts_caller_column_mapping_and_reconciles).

settle_power_hedge_interval.justification: Deterministic realised power-hedge settlement identity for one interval; unit-tested against hand-computed payoffs -- tests/unit/test_power_hedge.py (test_realized_hedge_payoffs_by_hand).

settle_power_hedges_frame.justification: Vectorised per-row application of settle_power_hedge_interval over a Polars frame; unit-tested for order-preservation and validation -- tests/unit/test_power_hedge.py.

mark_to_market.justification: Settlement-price / forward-curve fallback resolution plus daily/cumulative P&L bookkeeping; no new pricing equation. Unit-tested against hand-computed P&L -- tests/unit/test_mark_to_market.py (test_settled_position_hand_computed_pnl).

make_ppa_pricer.justification: Pure factory/composition function (no independent equation): closes over a PpaVolumeProfile mapping and returns a (Position, MarketData) -> PricedPosition callable for portfolio.valuation.value_portfolio. GAP: as of 2026-07-18 no test wires it into value_portfolio end to end -- flagged here rather than invented; price_ppa itself (the function it composes) is separately covered above.

power_cap_payoff.justification: max(spot_price - strike, 0) * volume_mwh payoff identity; unit-tested against hand-computed values -- tests/unit/test_ppa.py.

power_floor_payoff.justification: max(strike - spot_price, 0) * volume_mwh payoff identity; unit-tested against hand-computed values -- tests/unit/test_ppa.py.

spark_spread.justification: power_price - heat_rate * gas_price per shared period; linear arithmetic identity, hand-computed and unit-tested -- tests/unit/test_pricing_spreads.py (test_spark_spread_matches_hand_computed_values).

dark_spread.justification: power_price - heat_rate * coal_price per shared period; linear arithmetic identity, hand-computed and unit-tested -- tests/unit/test_pricing_spreads.py (test_dark_spread_matches_hand_computed_values).

clean_spread.justification: uncleaned spread minus emissions_intensity * EUA_price; linear arithmetic identity, unit-tested -- tests/unit/test_pricing_spreads.py (test_clean_spark_deducts_emissions_intensity_times_eua_price).

crack_spread.justification: input:outputs ratio-normalised refining-margin identity, unit-tested against hand-computed values -- tests/unit/test_pricing_spreads.py (test_crack_spread_3_2_1_matches_hand_computed_values).

forward_spread.justification: Identical formula to spark_spread (Property 43), differing only in time-horizon interpretation; unit-tested -- tests/unit/test_pricing_spreads.py (test_forward_spread_equals_spark_spread_on_identical_inputs).

calendar_spread.justification: Later-tenor minus earlier-tenor forward price, adjusted for storage cost; linear identity, unit-tested -- tests/unit/test_pricing_spreads.py (test_calendar_spread_is_later_minus_earlier_adjusted_for_storage).

basis.justification: Per-period A-minus-B difference plus descriptive statistics (mean/std/percentile) over that vector; cross-checked directly against numpy -- tests/unit/test_pricing_spreads.py (test_basis_statistics_match_numpy_on_the_per_period_vector).

implied_heat_rate.justification: power_price / gas_price per shared period (algebraic rearrangement of the spark-spread relation), unit-tested -- tests/unit/test_pricing_spreads.py (test_implied_heat_rate_is_power_over_gas_per_shared_period).

classify_moneyness.justification: Deterministic |strike - forward| / forward banding rule (Property 32), no external convention beyond the tolerance band itself; unit-tested for every boundary -- tests/unit/test_implied_vol.py (test_atm_boundary_at_exactly_two_percent_is_inclusive).

cumulative_historical_vol.justification: Standard rolling-window annualised realised-volatility estimator (log-return std * sqrt(periods_per_year)); recovers a known simulated sigma within tolerance -- tests/unit/test_implied_vol.py (test_gbm_sample_recovers_annualised_sigma_loosely). No external reference series is used.
